creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 204632
coredns.shar

The attached testcase depends on both github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go and gopkg.in/DataDog/dd-trace-go.v0.

When one of them is added to GH_TUPLE - the build requires anther one. When both are added - the build still says that one of them is missing.
